about.title: About
about.introText1: AI Knowledge Base is a platform focused on learning notes and technical sharing in the field of Artificial Intelligence. Here, I record my learning insights, technical summaries, and practical experiences.
about.introText2: The content covers machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, computer vision, etc., aiming to build a systematic knowledge system to help myself and others better understand AI.
about.introText3: All articles are written in Markdown, supporting math formula rendering and code highlighting, striving for accuracy and clarity.
about.contactText: If you have any questions, suggestions, or want to exchange ideas, feel free to contact me through the following ways.
about.licenseText: All original content on this site is licensed under {license}. Please credit the original source when reprinting.

footer.description: A growing collection of notes, experiments, and technical writing about AI systems, models, and tools.
